intro: Ouratea axillaris, also known as the "wild water pepper," is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
